name: mmbridge
description: Workspace for the mmbridge multi-model control plane

scripts.smoke: pnpm run build && pnpm run smoke:cli && pnpm run smoke:mcp
scripts.smoke:cli: node packages/cli/dist/bin/mmbridge.js doctor --json && node packages/cli/dist/bin/mmbridge.js context tree --json -p . && node packages/cli/dist/bin/mmbridge.js context packet --task "smoke" --json -p . && node packages/cli/dist/bin/mmbridge.js gate --format json --base-ref HEAD~1 -p .
scripts.release: changeset version && pnpm install && pnpm run build && changeset publish
